• Converts images to HTML text art with customizable settings
  • Features grayscale conversion, contrast adjustment, and multiple export options
  • Responsive design with controls and output display
    const contrastCurve = [...]; // Sine contrast curve
    function generateTextImage(ctx, width, height) { // Text generation logic }

This JavaScript application converts uploaded images into HTML text art using configurable settings like character set, width, background color, and font size. It includes grayscale conversion, contrast adjustment, and can export the results as HTML, SVG, or PNG formats.
